events.title: “AI-trade” ceases to be an unconditional beta trade and becomes macro-dependent (oil→inflation→risk-off)
events.description: "AI-trade" ceases to be an unconditional beta trade and becomes macro-dependent (oil→inflation→risk-off). Fact: global funds are "unwinding the hottest AI trades" amid fears of an oil-driven inflation shock and foreign capital outflows from Asian markets. This signals that the monetary "underpinning" of AI (risk appetite, cost of capital) is once again tightly linked to energy geopolitics.

events.title: The credit circuit of AI infrastructure is expanding: "AI junk bonds" as a normalized CapEx instrument
events.description: Credit loop of AI infrastructure expands: "AI junk bonds" as a normalized CapEx instrument. Fact: Applied Digital raises $2.15B through a junk-bond sale to scale compute for Oracle; demand for AI debt "remains firm." This is not venture capital or equity euphoria, but infrastructure financing through high-yield debt.

events.title: Defense AI and defense robotics are strengthening the influx of "big capital"
events.description: Defense AI and defense robotics are strengthening the inflow of "big capital." Fact: Thrive Capital and Andreessen Horowitz are co-leading Anduril's $4B round at a valuation of around $60B. This marks the institutionalization of "defense-tech + AI" as a distinct allocation class.

events.title: Escalation of the “society ↔ AI industry” conflict in urban technology hubs
events.description: Escalation of the “society ↔ AI industry” conflict in urban technology hubs Fact: London hosted the “biggest ever anti-AI protest” near King’s Cross, where the UK HQs of OpenAI/Meta/DeepMind are located. This signals the emergence of persistent informal counter-norms (anti-AI as social coordination).

events.title: Pressure is mounting on prediction markets (crypto-rooted institutions) → demand for strict "guardrails"
events.description: Pressure is mounting on prediction markets (crypto-rooted institutions) → demand for strict "guardrails." Fact: suspicious activity and calls from legislators for a crackdown on prediction markets amid conflict betting are being discussed. This breaks the "spontaneous order" of DeFi markets and pushes toward a regulatory framework.

events.title: The War of Trust Standards: “prove what’s real” as a Response to AI Disinformation
events.description: The war of trust standards: “prove what’s real” as a response to AI misinformation. Fact: Microsoft is advancing a plan “to prove what’s real and what’s AI online” – establishing ecosystem practices for content authenticity/origin (deception as the new market norm).

events.title: "Agency" is shifting from a feature to a discipline: an explosion of benchmarks, tracing, verification
events.description: "Agency" is shifting from a feature to a discipline: an explosion of benchmarks, tracing, verification. Fact package: TraderBench (agents in finance, evaluation based on realized performance, without LLM-judge variability) and numerous works on traces/explainability/verifiability of agent systems. (TraceSIR) (solver-grounded certificates) (LifeEval)

events.title: Institutional conflict over the defense application of LLM: "who makes the decisions"
events.description: Institutional conflict around the defense use of LLMs: "who makes the decisions" Fact: Altman tells employees that OpenAI "has no say over Pentagon decisions"; simultaneously, OpenAI’s "compromise" on use in classified settings raises fears at Anthropic. This shapes a new institutional framework: model provider ≠ application subject (especially in defense).

events.title: Personnel/organizational gaps in China’s “model factories”
events.description: Personnel/organizational gaps in China’s “model factories” Fact: the head of Qwen development at Alibaba is leaving, raising questions about the company’s pivot in AI. This signals the fragility of institutions for retaining key knowledge holders.

events.title: Transition from the "model" to the "runtime" and "observability" of the agent as a new object of engineering
events.description: Transition from the "model" to the "runtime" and "observability" of the agent as a new object of engineering. Fact: the work on "AI Runtime Infrastructure" formalizes a separate execution layer between the model and the application to intervene in behavior (latency/cost/reliability/safety).

events.title: Verifiable training loops: logic/constraints/tools as sources of reward
events.description: Verifiable training loops: logic/constraints/tools as sources of reward. Facts: LOGIGEN (deterministic state verification), T^3RL (tool-verification at test-time), CoVe (constraint-guided verification) – all of these normalize the “verifiable trajectory” as training raw material.

events.title: Cost Optimization of Reasoning: Combating Overthinking and Token Budget Constraints
events.description: Cost optimization of reasoning: combating overthinking and token budget Fact: Draft-Thinking reduces the reasoning budget (e.g., -82.6% tokens on MATH500 with only -2.6% quality loss). This is an important bridge to inference economy.

events.title: Vertical integration of the defense-tech chain: capital + system manufacturer + geopolitical demand
events.description: Vertical integration of the defense-tech chain: capital + system manufacturer + geopolitical demand. Facts: Anduril's $4B funding round (investors) amid narratives about the role of technology in modern warfare and defense supply chains.

events.title: Compute as a contract service: capacity providers are financed for a specific hyperscaler/customer.
events.description: Compute as a contract service: capacity providers are financed for a specific hyperscaler/customer. Fact: Applied Digital finances capacity “for Oracle,” i.e., a chain is formed “financial market → compute builder → anchor cloud consumer.”

events.title: Nvidia expands the "periphery" of its stack: investments in autonomous driving (UK) + optics for data centers
events.description: Nvidia is expanding the "periphery" of its stack: investments in autonomous driving (UK) + optics for data centers. Facts: investment in Oxa ($103M round) + $2B in photonics company Coherent for DC optical components. Nvidia is consolidating control over bottlenecks: (a) edge autonomy (AV), (b) interconnect within DC.

events.title: Optics/photonic technology as the new “bottleneck” of AI infrastructure (besides GPUs)
events.description: Optics/photonics as the new “bottleneck” of AI infrastructure (beyond GPUs) Fact: Nvidia is investing $2B in Coherent for advanced optical components for data centers. This shifts the competition to the realm of interconnect/bandwidth.

events.title: Quantization to FP4 in attention as a condition for the next leap in inference efficiency
events.description: Quantization to FP4 in attention as a prerequisite for the next leap in inference efficiency Fact: Attn-QAT on stable 4-bit attention and acceleration (up to 1.5x on RTX 5090). This is a “hardware” optimization directly impacting the cost of agents.

events.title: The growing role of “AI officers/guardrails” in finance and enterprise
events.description: The growing role of “AI officers/guardrails” in finance and enterprise Fact: public presentations by the Chief AI Officer (AllianceBernstein) on guardrails/use cases/efficiency, plus discussions on upskilling in HFT/trading (Hudson River Trading). This solidifies the new managerial profession of “responsible for AI implementation.”

events.title: Key developers of frontier models are becoming points of organizational risk
events.description: Key developers of frontier models are becoming points of organizational risk. Fact: the departure of the Qwen leader at Alibaba.

events.title: Urban "tech hubs" are becoming arenas for the politicization of AI
events.description: Urban "tech hubs" are becoming arenas for the politicization of AI. Fact: the protest in King’s Cross (London), i.e., the density of AI company offices, intensifies local social tensions and reputational risks.

events.title: UK as a hub for autonomous driving startups under the patronage of Nvidia
events.description: UK as a hub for autonomous driving startups under the patronage of Nvidia. Fact: Nvidia is investing in the British company Oxa – a continuation of the formation of regional autonomy clusters in Europe.

events.title: Energy shock (oil/gas) once again directly impacts AI through inflation/rates/risk appetite
events.description: Energy shock (oil/gas) again directly impacts AI through inflation/rates/risk appetite. Facts: fears of oil supply → inflation shock → sell-off of AI trades; separately discussed are the rise in oil & gas prices and risks to shipping lanes. This is a reminder: AI is an energy-intensive industry dependent on resource geopolitics.

events.title: “AI-trade” перестает быть безусловным бета-трейдом и становится макро-зависимым (oil→inflation→risk-off)
events.description: “AI-trade” перестает быть безусловным бета-трейдом и становится макро-зависимым (oil→inflation→risk-off) Факт: глобальные фонды “unwind hottest AI trades” на фоне страхов нефтяного инфляционного шока и ухода иностранцев из азиатских рынков. Это сигнал, что денежная “подложка” AI (аппетит к риску, стоимость капитала) снова жестко привязана к геополитике энергии.

events.title: Кредитный контур AI-инфраструктуры расширяется: «AI junk bonds» как нормализованный инструмент CapEx
events.description: Кредитный контур AI-инфраструктуры расширяется: «AI junk bonds» как нормализованный инструмент CapEx Факт: Applied Digital привлекает $2.15B через “junk-bond sale” для наращивания compute под Oracle; спрос на AI-долг “остается firm”. Это не венчур и не equity-эйфория, а инфраструктурное финансирование через высокодоходный долг.

events.title: Оборонный AI и оборонная робототехника усиливают приток “большого капитала”
events.description: Оборонный AI и оборонная робототехника усиливают приток “большого капитала” Факт: Thrive Capital и Andreessen Horowitz ко-лидируют раунд Anduril на $4B при оценке около $60B. Это институционализация “defense-tech + AI” как отдельного класса аллокации.

events.title: Эскалация конфликта “общество ↔ AI-индустрия” в городских технологических хабах
events.description: Эскалация конфликта “общество ↔ AI-индустрия” в городских технологических хабах Факт: в Лондоне прошел “biggest ever anti-AI protest” около King’s Cross, где расположены HQ OpenAI/Meta/DeepMind в UK. Это сигнал появления устойчивых неформальных контр-норм (anti-AI как общественная координация).

events.title: Нарастает давление на prediction markets (крипто-укорененные институты) → запрос на жесткие «guardrails»
events.description: Нарастает давление на prediction markets (крипто-укорененные институты) → запрос на жесткие «guardrails» Факт: обсуждаются подозрительная активность и призывы законодателей к crackdown на рынки прогнозов на фоне конфликтного беттинга. Это ломает “спонтанный порядок” DeFi-рынков и тянет к регуляторному контуру.

events.title: Война стандартов доверия: “prove what’s real” как ответ на AI-дезинформацию
events.description: Война стандартов доверия: “prove what’s real” как ответ на AI-дезинформацию Факт: Microsoft продвигает план “to prove what’s real and what’s AI online” - формирование экосистемных практик аутентичности/происхождения контента (deception как новая норма рынка).

events.title: “Агентность” сдвигается из фичи в дисциплину: взрыв бенчмарков, трассировки, верификации
events.description: “Агентность” сдвигается из фичи в дисциплину: взрыв бенчмарков, трассировки, верификации Факт-пакет: TraderBench (агенты в финансах, оценка по realized performance, без LLM-judge вариативности) и множество работ про трассы/объяснимость/верифицируемость агентных систем. (TraceSIR) (solver-grounded certificates) (LifeEval)

events.title: Институциональный конфликт вокруг оборонного применения LLM: “кто принимает решения”
events.description: Институциональный конфликт вокруг оборонного применения LLM: “кто принимает решения” Факт: Altman говорит сотрудникам, что OpenAI “has no say over Pentagon decisions”; параллельно - “compromise” OpenAI по использованию в classified settings вызывает страхи Anthropic. Это оформляет новый институтный контур: поставщик модели ≠ субъект применения (особенно в defense).

events.title: Кадровые/организационные разрывы в “фабриках моделей” Китая
events.description: Кадровые/организационные разрывы в “фабриках моделей” Китая Факт: глава разработки Qwen в Alibaba уходит, что поднимает вопросы о pivot компании в AI. Это сигнал хрупкости институтов удержания ключевых носителей знания.

events.title: Переход от “модели” к “рантайму” и “наблюдаемости” агента как к новому объекту инженерии
events.description: Переход от “модели” к “рантайму” и “наблюдаемости” агента как к новому объекту инженерии Факт: работа “AI Runtime Infrastructure” формализует отдельный execution-layer между моделью и приложением для вмешательства в поведение (latency/cost/reliability/safety).

events.title: Верифицируемые контуры обучения: логика/ограничения/инструменты как источники reward
events.description: Верифицируемые контуры обучения: логика/ограничения/инструменты как источники reward Факты: LOGIGEN (детерминированная state verification), T^3RL (tool-verification at test-time), CoVe (constraint-guided verification) - всё это нормализует “проверяемую траекторию” как сырье обучения.

events.title: Оптимизация стоимости reasoning: борьба с overthinking и токен-бюджетом
events.description: Оптимизация стоимости reasoning: борьба с overthinking и токен-бюджетом Факт: Draft-Thinking снижает reasoning budget (например, -82.6% токенов на MATH500 при -2.6% качества). Это важный мост к экономике inference.

events.title: Вертикальная сборка defense-tech цепочки: капитал + производитель систем + геополитический спрос
events.description: Вертикальная сборка defense-tech цепочки: капитал + производитель систем + геополитический спрос Факты: раунд Anduril на $4B (инвесторы) на фоне сюжетов про роль технологий в современной войне и цепочки поставок defense.

events.title: Compute как контрактная услуга: провайдеры capacity финансируются под конкретного гиперскейлера/заказчика
events.description: Compute как контрактная услуга: провайдеры capacity финансируются под конкретного гиперскейлера/заказчика Факт: Applied Digital финансирует мощность “for Oracle”, т.е. формируется цепочка “финансовый рынок → compute builder → якорный потребитель облака”.

events.title: Nvidia расширяет “периферию” своего стека: инвестиции в автономное вождение (UK) + оптику для дата-центров
events.description: Nvidia расширяет “периферию” своего стека: инвестиции в автономное вождение (UK) + оптику для дата-центров Факты: инвестиция в Oxa ($103M round) + $2B в photonics Coherent для оптических компонентов DC. Nvidia закрепляет контроль над узкими местами: (а) edge autonomy (AV), (б) interconnect внутри DC.

events.title: Оптика/фотоника как новый “бутылочный горлышко” AI-инфраструктуры (помимо GPU)
events.description: Оптика/фотоника как новый “бутылочный горлышко” AI-инфраструктуры (помимо GPU) Факт: Nvidia инвестирует $2B в Coherent ради advanced optical components для дата-центров. Это переводит конкуренцию в плоскость interconnect/bandwidth.

events.title: Квантизация до FP4 в attention как условие следующего скачка эффективности inference
events.description: Квантизация до FP4 в attention как условие следующего скачка эффективности inference Факт: Attn-QAT про стабильное 4-bit attention и ускорение (до 1.5x на RTX 5090). Это “железная” оптимизация, напрямую влияющая на себестоимость агентов.

events.title: Рост роли “AI officers/guardrails” в финансах и enterprise
events.description: Рост роли “AI officers/guardrails” в финансах и enterprise Факт: публичные выступления Chief AI Officer (AllianceBernstein) про guardrails/use cases/efficiency, плюс обсуждение upskilling в HFT/трейдинге (Hudson River Trading). Это закрепляет новую управленческую профессию “ответственный за внедрение AI”.

events.title: Ключевые разработчики frontier-моделей становятся точками организационного риска
events.description: Ключевые разработчики frontier-моделей становятся точками организационного риска Факт: уход руководителя Qwen у Alibaba.

events.title: Городские “тех-хабы” становятся ареной политизации AI
events.description: Городские “тех-хабы” становятся ареной политизации AI Факт: протест в King’s Cross (Лондон), т.е. плотность офисов AI-компаний усиливает локальные социальные напряжения и репутационные риски.

events.title: UK как площадка для autonomous driving стартапов под патронажем Nvidia
events.description: UK как площадка для autonomous driving стартапов под патронажем Nvidia Факт: Nvidia инвестирует в британский Oxa - продолжение формирования региональных кластеров автономности в Европе.

events.title: Энергетический шок (нефть/газ) снова напрямую бьет по AI через инфляцию/ставки/риск-аппетит
events.description: Энергетический шок (нефть/газ) снова напрямую бьет по AI через инфляцию/ставки/риск-аппетит Факты: страхи oil-supply → inflation shock → распродажа AI-трейдов; отдельно обсуждаются рост цен на oil&gas и риски shipping lanes. Это напоминание: AI - энергоёмкая отрасль, зависимая от геополитики ресурсов.

trends.name: AI-CapEx / infrastructure (compute buildout)
trends.rationale: Large debt placements for expanding computing capacity indicate sustained demand for capacity even amid growing uncertainty.

trends.name: Financialization of AI through high-yield / junk bonds
trends.rationale: “AI-related debt remains firm” – consolidation of the debt channel as a systemic mechanism.

trends.name: Defense-tech + AI (autonomous systems, contracts, capital)
trends.rationale: $4B round for Anduril at approximately $60B valuation amid discourse on “reshaping warfare.”

trends.name: Optical interconnect / photonics for data centers
trends.rationale: $2B investment by Nvidia in Coherent – a clear bet on the next bottleneck in data centers.

trends.name: Agent observability & runtime governance (runtime infrastructure, tracing, self-healing)
trends.rationale: A separate execution layer and tools for diagnostics/analysis of agent traces are being established as a new engineering norm.

trends.name: Verifiable/validatable agent training (constraints/tools as verifier)
trends.rationale: LOGIGEN / CoVe / T^3RL – common vector: data and RL through deterministic trajectory verification.

trends.name: “Hottest AI trades” as a market narrative (momentum equity)
trends.rationale: Risk-off environment amid oil/inflation leads to unwind and capital outflow from the most overheated AI bets (especially in Asia).

trends.name: Prediction markets (crypto roots) as a mass coordination tool for expectations
trends.rationale: “Fast start running out of steam” plus intensification of regulatory discussions/guardrails – cooling off.

trends.name: Social legitimacy of AI (protests/public conflict)
trends.rationale: Largest anti-AI protest in London – growth of visible politicization and public mobilization.

trends.name: LLM as product/API; quality control through post-factum logs and offline evaluations
trends.rationale: Fading: the transition from “LLM as product/API; quality control through post-facto logs and offline evaluations” to “agent as process/execution, where *runtime* (cost, reliability, security) is optimized, not just weights.” Mentions in the context of the transition: 7

trends.name: AI growth mainly through equity/venture and “story stocks”
trends.rationale: Fading: the transition from “AI growth mainly through equity/venture and ‘story stocks’” to “compute construction as project financing under anchor contracts; junk bonds as a standard instrument.” Mentions in the context of the transition: 3

trends.name: “AI company can control who and how uses it”
trends.rationale: Fading: the transition from “AI company can control who and how uses [the product]” to “government customer/Pentagon defines application; supplier fixes contractual frameworks but does not own the solution.” Mentions in the context of the transition: 0

cross_level_links.title: Энергия/конфликт (Ур.1) → макро-риск (Ур.9) → пересборка AI-капитала (Ур.9/5)
cross_level_links.description: Energy/conflict (Lvl.1) → macro-risk (Lvl.9) → AI capital reassembly (Lvl.9/5) - Rising concerns over oil/inflation (Lvl.1) trigger exit from AI trades and increased volatility (Lvl.9). - Simultaneously, infrastructure AI CapEx does not halt but “flows” into debt instruments (Lvl.9) and contract schemes of “compute-for-Oracle” (Lvl.5).

cross_level_links.title: Оборонный спрос (Ур.9/8/7) → ускорение разделения труда (Ур.5) → технологические узкие места (Ур.4)
cross_level_links.description: Defense demand (Lvl.9/8/7) → acceleration of labor division (Lvl.5) → technological bottlenecks (Lvl.4) - Growth in defense-tech investments (Anduril) (Lvl.9) is associated with the legitimization of AI in warfare and supply chain issues (Lvl.8/7). - This increases pressure on the infrastructure stack (optics/interconnect) and manufacturing capacities (Lvl.4/2).

cross_level_links.title: Социальная контр-реакция (Ур.8/2) → требования к институтам доверия (Ур.8/7) → новые тех-практики (Ур.6/4)
cross_level_links.description: Social counter-reaction (Level 8/2) → demands for trust institutions (Level 8/7) → new tech practices (Level 6/4) - Protests against AI (Level 8/2) + increase in deception stimulate projects on “proof of reality” and new verification/traceability practices (Level 8/7). - In science/engineering, this is reflected in an explosion of approaches to “verifiable trajectories/runtime infrastructure” (Level 6).

structural_shifts.title: From "model" to "execution": agents as a managed runtime
structural_shifts.from: LLM as a product/API; quality control through post-factum logs and offline evaluations.
structural_shifts.to: Agent as a process/execution, where *runtime* (cost, reliability, security) is optimized, not just the weights.
structural_shifts.through: The emergence of a distinct AI Runtime Infrastructure layer, coupled with the growth of tracing/diagnostics methods and verifiable learning.

structural_shifts.title: Financialization of compute: AI infrastructure shifts onto debt tracks
structural_shifts.from: AI growth is primarily driven through equity/venture capital and “story stocks.”
structural_shifts.to: Compute construction as project financing under anchor contracts; junk bonds as a standard instrument.
structural_shifts.through: $2.15B high-yield issuance for compute expansion at Oracle.

structural_shifts.title: Defense Institutionalization of AI: Model Provider Separates from Application Entity
structural_shifts.from: An AI company can control who and how its technology is used.
structural_shifts.to: The government customer/Pentagon defines the application; the supplier establishes the contractual framework but does not own the solution.
structural_shifts.through: Altman's position + classified use deal; conflict/tension with Anthropic as a manifestation of the struggle over access regimes and accountability.

momentum_trends.name: AI-CapEx / infrastructure (compute buildout)
momentum_trends.rationale: Large debt placements for computing expansion indicate sustained demand for capacity even amid growing uncertainty.

momentum_trends.name: Financialization of AI through high-yield / junk bonds
momentum_trends.rationale: “AI-related debt remains firm” - consolidation of the debt channel as a systemic mechanism.

momentum_trends.name: Defense-tech + AI (autonomous systems, contracts, capital)
momentum_trends.rationale: $4B round for Anduril at approximately $60B valuation amid discourse on “reshaping warfare.”

momentum_trends.name: Optical interconnect / photonics for data centers
momentum_trends.rationale: $2B investment by Nvidia in Coherent - a clear bet on the next bottleneck in data centers.

momentum_trends.name: Agent observability & runtime governance (runtime infrastructure, tracing, self-healing)
momentum_trends.rationale: A separate execution layer and tools for diagnostics/analysis of agent traces are being established as a new engineering norm.

momentum_trends.name: Verifiable/checkable agent training (constraints/tools as verifier)
momentum_trends.rationale: LOGIGEN / CoVe / T^3RL - common vector: data and RL through deterministic trajectory verification.

momentum_trends.name: “Hottest AI trades” as a market narrative (momentum equity)
momentum_trends.rationale: Risk-off environment amid oil/inflation leads to unwind and capital flight from the most overheated AI bets (especially in Asia).

momentum_trends.name: Prediction markets (crypto roots) as a mass tool for coordinating expectations
momentum_trends.rationale: “Fast start running out of steam” + intensification of regulatory discussions/guardrails - cooling down.

momentum_trends.name: Social legitimacy of AI (protests/public conflict)
momentum_trends.rationale: Largest anti-AI protest in London - growth of visible politicization and public mobilization.

momentum_trends.name: LLM as a product/API; quality control through post-factum logs and offline evaluations.
momentum_trends.rationale: Fading: the transition from “LLM as product/API; quality control through post-factum logs and offline evaluations.” to “agent as process/execution, where *runtime* (cost, reliability, security) is optimized, not just weights.” Mentions in transition context: 7

momentum_trends.name: AI growth mainly through equity/venture and “story stocks.”
momentum_trends.rationale: Fading: the transition from “AI growth mainly through equity/venture and ‘story stocks.’” to “compute construction as project financing under anchor contracts; junk bonds as a standard instrument.” Mentions in transition context: 3

momentum_trends.name: “AI company can control who and how it is used.”
momentum_trends.rationale: Fading: the transition from “AI company can control who and how it is used.” to “government customer/Pentagon defines application; supplier fixes contractual frameworks but does not own the solution.” Mentions in transition context: 0
